vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd

triage_decision.reason: This is a standard file permission hardening rule for /etc/passwd. The remediation is a simple chmod command that does not affect authentication, networking, or filesystems. It is a low-risk, low-complexity change that follows STIG best practices.
